title: Thin Tool/Scenario Independent Optimization Freeze
scope: All /tools/ and /scenario/ variant pages that are thin parameterized duplicates of parent calculators.
reason: Jun 10 and Jun 11 autonomous runs applied CTR/title/meta template improvements to ~150+ thin tool variants (loan, mortgage, compound, investment-return). These improvements were designed to make thin variants rank independently — directly contradicting Phase 20 cannibalization review which identified 28 of 34 near-winner pages as thin tools/scenario duplicates stealing rankings from parent calculators.

violations_documented.affected: mortgage, compound, investment-return tool variant templates

violations_documented.action: 5 CTR template fixes on tool variants
violations_documented.affected: loan, mortgage, investment-return, compound tool variant templates

allowed_actions.audit: Allowed — classify thin pages, check health, verify parent relationship
allowed_actions.link_to_parent: Allowed — add internal links pointing thin variants → parent calculator
allowed_actions.remove_from_sitemap: Allowed ONLY if Auditor + Technical Guardian approve (Tiny Cleanup Test)
allowed_actions.canonical_noindex_review: Allowed — document recommendations, hold for approval
allowed_actions.keep_accessible_for_users: Allowed — if page serves user value, keep live but do not optimize for SEO

prohibited_actions.broad_ctr_title_template_improvements: PROHIBITED — do not improve meta/title/CTR templates designed to make thin variants rank independently
prohibited_actions.treat_as_primary_landing: PROHIBITED — thin variants are NOT primary landing pages. Parent calculators are.
prohibited_actions.push_internal_links_to_thin_variants: PROHIBITED — internal links point to parent calculators, not thin variants
prohibited_actions.create_new_variants: PROHIBITED — no new /tools/ or /scenario/ parameterized pages
prohibited_actions.improve_as_standalone_seo: PROHIBITED — no independent SEO optimization of thin variant pages
prohibited_actions.bulk_noindex_canonical_redirect_delete: PROHIBITED — held for Auditor + Technical Guardian approval

governance.override_process: Any exception to this freeze requires explicit approval documented in thin-tool-scenario-optimization-freeze.json
governance.review_frequency: Reviewed daily by Phase 19 autonomous loop — must check freeze policy before modifying seo-utils.ts tool templates
